clusters.synthesis: Agent authority, policy, and supply-chain risk: limiting overprivilege, enforcing controls in workflow, and using LLMs to find security issues.
Isolated execution environments for agents, ranging from sandbox fleets to hardware virtualization and sandboxed debugging runs.
Ways to judge agent behavior and readiness, including verification, launch criteria, ablations, slice-based evals, and benchmark-style filters.
Memory and context management for agents, including cognitive debt, context sprawl, and graph-based retrieval or data models.
Using accessibility trees and structured UI affordances so agents can operate desktop interfaces directly.
Organizing agentic development as a managed production system, with manager-worker coordination, orchestration, and explicit human ownership.
Agentic coding and task execution as a structured workflow, including task-model separation, reward hacking, and ambition versus constraint.

clusters.canonicalTopic: MCP Apps as Agentic App Runtime
clusters.synthesis: Typed tool contracts and structured tool execution as the substrate for dependable agent actions.
System-level choices that shape model behavior and deployment, including model improvement loops, harness layers, and local control tradeoffs.
Knowledge-graph-centered retrieval and provenance-aware synthesis for assistants that need traceable facts.
Automated research workflows where agents generate, connect, and validate findings, including synthetic personas and provenance-aware graph building.
Prioritizing workable, traceable pathways for actions and state updates over the specific shape of the input or artifact.
Research and product framing around fit, imagination, forecasting analogies, and operational bottlenecks; the concepts are related but not one reusable topic.
Architectures that separate reasoning and coordination from execution environments.
A product strategy that keeps multiple models available and avoids locking the business to one provider.
Managed self-serve training that supports multi-tenant LoRA and upcoming full fine-tuning.
Agents that plan, execute, and verify work on a schedule or loop.
Enterprise-oriented infrastructure for owning workflows, routing models, and retraining on live work.
The shift from hallucination as a generic concern to wrong-but-confident business answers that undermine adoption.
The importance of temporal order and multimodal signals in making video meaningful.
